records.display_name: 7 line trip shifts

payload.claim_text: One southbound 7 local trip and one southbound 7 express trip would be moved from the 9-10 a.m. hour to the 5-6 a.m. and 6-7 a.m. hours as two southbound 7 local trips. One northbound 7 local trip and one northbound 7 express trip would be moved from the 5-6 p.m. and 6-7 p.m. hours to the 3-4 p.m. and 4-5 p.m. hours.
payload.subject: 7 line schedule shifts

records.raw_text: One southbound 7 local trip and one southbound 7 express trip would be moved from the 9-10 a.m. hour to the 5-6 a.m. and 6-7 a.m. hours as two southbound 7 local trips. One northbound 7 local trip and one northbound 7 express trip would be moved from the 5-6 p.m. and 6-7 p.m. hours to the 3-4 p.m. and 4-5 p.m. hours.

records.display_name: Crew requirement: 4 unchanged, 7 one fewer

payload.claim_text: The number of crews that would be required for 4 service would be unchanged, while one fewer crew would be needed for 7 service.
payload.subject: 4 and 7 lines crew requirements

records.raw_text: The number of crews that would be required for 4 service would be unchanged, while one fewer crew would be needed for 7 service.

records.display_name: 4 line trip shifts

payload.claim_text: Two southbound 4 trips would be moved from the 9-10 a.m. hour to the 5-6 a.m. hour. One northbound 4 trip would be moved from the 7-8 p.m. hour to the 3-4 p.m. hour.
payload.subject: 4 line schedule shifts

records.raw_text: Two southbound 4 trips would be moved from the 9-10 a.m. hour to the 5-6 a.m. hour. One northbound 4 trip would be moved from the 7-8 p.m. hour to the 3-4 p.m. hour.

records.display_name: No net change in total daily trips

payload.claim_text: There is no net change proposed in the total number of daily trips on the 4 and 7 lines.
payload.subject: 4 and 7 lines

records.raw_text: There is no net change proposed in the total number of daily trips on the 4 and 7 lines.

records.display_name: MTA Board-adopted loading guideline 110 passengers per A Division car

payload.claim_text: Weekday 4 and 7 trains do not, on average, carry passenger volumes in excess of the maximum load specified in the MTA Board-adopted loading guidelines (110 passengers per A Division car).
payload.subject: 4 and 7 lines loading guidelines

records.raw_text: Weekday 4 and 7 trains do not, on average, carry passenger volumes in excess of the maximum load specified in the MTA Board-adopted loading guidelines (110 passengers per A Division car).

records.display_name: IRT Flushing Line (7) has_claim 7 line trip shifts
records.raw_text: One southbound 7 local trip and one southbound 7 express trip would be moved from the 9-10 a.m. hour to the 5-6 a.m. and 6-7 a.m. hours as two southbound 7 local trips. One northbound 7 local trip and one northbound 7 express trip would be moved from the 5-6 p.m. and 6-7 p.m. hours to the 3-4 p.m. and 4-5 p.m. hours.

records.display_name: IRT Flushing Line (7) has_claim MTA Board-adopted loading guideline 110 passengers per A Division car
records.raw_text: Weekday 4 and 7 trains do not, on average, carry passenger volumes in excess of the maximum load specified in the MTA Board-adopted loading guidelines (110 passengers per A Division car).

records.display_name: 4 Line (subway)
records.raw_text: 4 and 7 line schedule changes

records.display_name: IRT Flushing Line (7)
records.raw_text: 4 and 7 line schedule changes

records.display_name: A Division Subway Schedule Changes
